return(function(X,U,c,C,J,u,y,z,r,M,Y,D,w,d,V,k,N,B,Q,o,G,F,p,l)N,D,Q,w,p,V,Y,r,l,o,G,B,F,M,k,d,z=function(X,x)local U=w(x)local c=function(c,C,J)return r(X,{c,C;J},x,U)end return c
